name: Testament of Faith
descriptionTemplate: Miryam gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Tentacle Limit and Tentacle Count +1. Inflict 1 stack of {Weakness} and {Vulnerable} on all enemies. Miryam's "Strike" and {Exalted Pyre} Crit. Rate +100%. Place 1 {Heretical Faith} into hand.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Miryam gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Tentacle Limit and Tentacle Count +1. Inflict 1 stack of {Weakness} and {Vulnerable} on all enemies. Miryam's "Strike" and {Exalted Pyre} Crit. Rate +100%. Place 1 {Heretical Faith} into hand. For every 2 {Sacrament} cards flipped, place 1 {Divine Realm's Illusion} into hand.
